description: Model a DIN EN 1092-1 DN50 PN16 pipe flange starting from a blank canvas. The flange requires an outer diameter of 165 mm and an inner bore diameter of 61 mm. Use a construction geometry pitch circle with a diameter of 125 mm to place four 18 mm diameter bolt holes symmetrically at the 12, 3, 6, and 9 o'clock positions. Extrude the model to a thickness of 18 mm and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/dn50_flange.slvs.
